title: Executive Dashboard Project Schema
description: JSON Schema for project data used by the Executive Dashboard. Defines required fields, optional fields, enums, constraints, and data types for project configuration.

name.description: Project name or codename. Required field. Must be between 1-200 characters. Example: 'Project Blue Sky' or 'Q2 Release Initiative'.

description.description: Optional project description or summary. Provides context about project goals and scope. Recommended length 50-500 characters. Example: 'Core platform modernization and feature expansion for 2024-2025 fiscal year.'

startDate.description: Optional project start date in ISO 8601 format. Accepts both date-only (YYYY-MM-DD) or full datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ). Examples: '2024-01-15' or '2024-01-15T09:00:00Z'.

targetEndDate.description: Optional project target completion date in ISO 8601 format. Accepts both date-only (YYYY-MM-DD) or full datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ). Examples: '2024-12-31' or '2024-12-31T23:59:59Z'.

completionPercentage.description: Overall project completion percentage. Required field. Must be an integer between 0-100 inclusive. Represents the percentage of total work completed. Example: 45 means 45% complete.

healthStatus.description: Project health status indicator. Required field. Valid values: 'OnTrack' (project proceeding as planned), 'AtRisk' (project at risk due to resource or timeline issues), 'Blocked' (project blocked by external dependency).

velocityThisMonth.description: Optional velocity metric: count of work items completed in current month. Must be zero or positive integer. Example: 12 means 12 items shipped this month.

milestones.description: Array of project milestones. Required field. Must contain at least one milestone. Milestones represent key project deliverables or phases ordered by target date.

name.description: Milestone name or title. Required field. Example: 'Phase 1 Launch' or 'Q2 Release'.

targetDate.description: Milestone target completion date in ISO 8601 format. Required field. Accepts both date-only (YYYY-MM-DD) or full datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ). Examples: '2024-03-31' or '2024-03-31T23:59:59Z'.

status.description: Milestone status. Required field. Valid values: 'Completed' (finished), 'InProgress' (currently active), 'AtRisk' (at risk of missing target date), 'Future' (not yet started).

description.description: Optional milestone description providing context or deliverables. Example: 'Core feature rollout including API redesign and data migration.'

workItems.description: Array of work items representing completed, in-progress, or carried over tasks. Required field (can be empty array). Work items are grouped by status for display.

title.description: Work item title or task name. Required field. Example: 'API Integration' or 'Database Migration'.

description.description: Optional work item description providing details about the task. Example: 'Connect to external data source and implement error handling.'

status.description: Work item status. Required field. Valid values: 'Shipped' (completed and deployed this month), 'InProgress' (currently being worked on), 'CarriedOver' (planned but not completed, carried to next period).

assignedTo.description: Optional name or identifier of person/team assigned to this work item. Example: 'Team A' or 'John Smith'.

examples.name: Project Blue Sky
examples.description: Comprehensive platform modernization initiative for enterprise clients

workItems.title: Data Migration
workItems.description: Move legacy data to new schema

workItems.title: Performance Benchmarking
workItems.description: Profiling and optimization of core endpoints

workItems.description: REST API endpoints for mobile clients
